user.title: HoYoLAB Credentials
user.description:
Enter your HoYoLAB cookie values.

Open hoyolab.com -> F12 -> Console -> type: document.cookie
Copy the ltoken_v2 and ltuid_v2 values.

games.title: Game Configuration
games.description: Enter the UID and server for each game you want to track. Leave blank to skip a game.

error.invalid_cookie: Invalid cookie. Please check your ltoken_v2 and ltuid_v2 values.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to HoYoLAB. Please check your network connection.
error.uid_server_mismatch: If you enter a UID, you must also select a server (and vice versa).
